race.comment: ZEITGEIST (8) has a decent profile with a couple of decent efforts at Canterbury to launch his career. Doesn't possess a great amount of early toe but is one to watch for late in the piece and should take some holding out. DASHING TRIPLE (1) was unwanted in betting but did a good job to work home into second on debut over 1200m at Newcastle recently. Awkwardly drawn but if things go right he is a definite contender. DIRTY LIL' DIVA (9) made a little late ground on debut last start and can improve over a longer trip today. MINDGAMES (5) has had three trials in preparation for his debut and appears the next in line from the middle draw.
